title: DeCubes MoMons Addon
description: This pack adds custom models, textures, and animations for Pokémon currently not in Cobblemon. Also adds custom spawns if installed as a datapack for your world.
body:
**DeCubes MoMons** is an unofficial resource pack for the Cobblemon mod.

*(Extract the zip file and place it in both your resourcepack and datapack folders for it to work properly)*

This pack adds custom models, textures, and animations for Pokemon currently not in Cobblemon. Also adds custom spawns if installed as a datapack for your world.

All textures, models, and animations in this pack are made by me, DefaultCube (DeCube). Join the official Cobblemon Discord server to contribute!

## **DeCubes MoMons** pack: ##
- Azurill, Marill, and Azumarill
- Iron Hands
- Hisuian Growlithe and Arcanine
- Wurmple, Silcoon, Cascoon, Beautifly & Dustox
- Seviper & Zangoose
- Oranguru & Passimian

## **DeCubes Archive** pack: ##
- Trapinch, Vibrava, and Flygon
- Spheal, Sealeo, and Walrein
- Makuhita, Hariyama

## Removed: ##
- ~~Wingull and Pelipper~~
- ~~Combee~~


<details>
<summary>Spawns</summary>

*Azurill, Marill, & Azumarill:*
All three spawn in the swamp and plains biomes.

*Trapinch, Vibrava, & Flygon:*
All three spawn in desert biomes.

*Spheal, Sealeo, & Walrein:*
All three spawn in snowy Taiga biomes.

*Makuhita, Hariyama, & Iron Hands:*
All three spawn in mountain biomes.

*Hisuian Growlithe & Arcanine:*
Both spawn in mountain biomes and the Nether.

*Wurmple, Silcoon, Cascoon, Beautifly & Dustox:*
All can be found spawning in jungles and forests.

*Seviper & Zangoose:*
Both can be found in plains biomes.

*Oranguru & Passimian:*
Both can be found in jungle biomes.
If you're lucky, you'll find a red-leaf Passimian based on the anime.

</details>
